title: AI Boom! South Korea's Exports Set New Records in July, Semiconductor Exports Surge More Than 1.8 Times
excerpt: The continuous expansion of artificial intelligence and data center construction worldwide has triggered a global rush to purchase semiconductor products. Accor
content_html:
The continuous expansion of artificial intelligence and data center construction worldwide has triggered a global rush to purchase semiconductor products. According to the latest data released by the South Korean customs, the export value in the first 20 days of July this year increased by 62.9% compared to the same period last year, after adjusting for differences in working days, directly setting a new historical high for exports in July.

Looking at the unadjusted base data, the total exports of South Korea in the first 20 days of July also saw a significant increase of 52.3%, while the import value grew by 20%. Driven by strong exports, South Korea achieved a trade surplus of 12.2 billion US dollars during this period, demonstrating its solid strength in foreign trade.

Chip shipments double, technology products lead exports

In this surge of exports, the semiconductor industry is undoubtedly the core growth engine, showing remarkable performance. Statistics show that the export value of chips in South Korea in the first 20 days of July surged by 180.6% compared to the same period last year, fully reflecting the explosive demand for computing chips in the global AI industry.

At the same time, the shipment of computers and related products also experienced an astonishing increase of nearly 232%, while fuel exports rose by 33.4%. In contrast, car exports declined by 10.6%, showing a new trend in exports where technology hardware leads and traditional industries are differentiated.

content_html_zh:
全球范围内人工智能和数据中心建设的不断扩张，引发了全球半导体产品的抢购热潮。 韩国海关公布的最新数据显示，今年7月前20天的出口额在调整工作日差异后较去年同期增长62.9%，直接刷新7月出口历史新高。

从未经调整的基数数据来看，韩国7月前20天的出口总额也出现了52.3%的大幅增长，而进口额则增长了20%。 在强劲出口的拉动下，韩国在此期间实现了122亿美元的贸易顺差，展现了其雄厚的外贸实力。

芯片出货量翻倍，科技产品引领出口

在本次出口激增中，半导体产业无疑是核心增长引擎，表现亮眼。 统计显示，7月前20天韩国芯片出口额较去年同期激增180.6%，充分体现了全球AI产业对计算芯片的爆发式需求。

与此同时，计算机及相关产品的出货量也出现了近232%的惊人增长，而燃料出口则增长了33.4%。 相比之下，汽车出口下降10.6%，呈现出科技硬件引领、传统产业分化的出口新趋势。
